app.name: Loudline
app.tagline: Offline LUFS metering for your masters

footer.privacyWeb: All processing stays in your browser. Nothing is uploaded.
footer.privacyApp: All processing stays on this device. Nothing is uploaded.

fileStrip.waveformNote: {{size}} · waveform shows peak level across channels

meter.hoverChart: Hover the chart to see values at the playhead

transport.hoverChartOrFile: Hover the chart or file strip
transport.selectRegion: Drag on the chart to select a time range
transport.mobileScrub: Touch the chart to scrub. Use the bar below to play or pause.
transport.largeFilesNote: Long files are decoded fully in memory. Very long masters may be slow on devices with little RAM.

chart.resetYTitle: Reset the LUFS axis to auto-fit

selection.title: SELECTION
selection.heavyPending: Integrated loudness, LRA, and true peak for this range are measured after you release the mouse, so the UI stays responsive.
selection.tooShort: This selection is too short to analyze.
